name: 9 Mothers
long_description:
We have sold $1.6m of systems to the DoW. Multiple systems delivered to the DoW.

Our first product - EDDA - is a counter drone system - small, low power, low cost fully autonomous-capable. It's designed to be used on vehicles, bases, or carried - to stop group 1 suicide drones. We have multiple contracts, sales, etc.

We have 3 more products with demand in various stages of development.

More details at https://9mothers.com
one_liner: counter drone - $1.6mm sold. Systems delivered, and in-use by DoW
